mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SETTLEMENT ( TRD_SN, USR_SN, STLM_AMT, STLM_STATUS_CD ) VALUES ( #{trdSn}, #{usrSn}, #{stlmAmt}, #{stlmStatusCd} )
mapper.select: SELECT STLM_SN AS stlmSn, TRD_SN AS trdSn, USR_SN AS usrSn, STLM_AMT AS stlmAmt, STLM_STATUS_CD AS stlmStatusCd, STLM_REG_DT AS stlmRegDt, STLM_UPDT_DT AS stlmUpdtDt FROM SETTLEMENT WHERE STLM_SN = #{stlmSn} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE SETTLEMENT SET STLM_STATUS_CD = #{statusCd}, STLM_UPDT_DT = NOW() WHERE STLM_SN = #{stlmSn}
mapper.select: SELECT STLM_SN AS stlmSn, TRD_SN AS trdSn, USR_SN AS usrSn, STLM_AMT AS stlmAmt, STLM_STATUS_CD AS stlmStatusCd, STLM_REG_DT AS stlmRegDt, STLM_UPDT_DT AS stlmUpdtDt FROM SETTLEMENT WHERE USR_SN = #{usrSn} ORDER BY STLM_SN DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT STLM_SN AS stlmSn, TRD_SN AS trdSn, USR_SN AS usrSn, STLM_AMT AS stlmAmt, STLM_STATUS_CD AS stlmStatusCd, STLM_REG_DT AS stlmRegDt, STLM_UPDT_DT AS stlmUpdtDt FROM SETTLEMENT WHERE TRD_SN = #{trdSn} ORDER BY STLM_SN DESC
